mapper.sql: select id, site_id, category_id, relation_type, is_visible, is_editable, sort_order, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from gb_site_category_relations
mapper.select: select r.id, r.site_id, r.category_id, r.is_visible, r.is_editable, r.sort_order, c.name as category_name, c.slug as category_slug, c.category_type as category_type, c.icon as category_icon from gb_site_category_relations r inner join gb_categories c on r.category_id = c.id where r.site_id = #{siteId} order by r.sort_order, r.id

select r.id, r.site_id, r.category_id, r.relation_type, r.is_visible, r.is_editable, r.sort_order, w.name as site_name, w.code as site_code, w.domain as site_domain from gb_site_category_relations r inner join gb_sites w on r.site_id = w.id where r.category_id = #{categoryId} order by r.sort_order, r.id
select count(*) from gb_site_category_relations where site_id = #{siteId} and category_id = #{categoryId} and relation_type = 'exclude'

SELECT r.*, c.name as category_name, c.category_type, s.name as site_name FROM gb_site_category_relations r INNER JOIN gb_categories c ON r.category_id = c.id INNER JOIN gb_sites ps ON c.site_id = ps.id AND ps.is_personal = '1' LEFT JOIN gb_sites s ON r.site_id = s.id WHERE c.del_flag = '0' AND c.status = '1' ORDER BY r.site_id, r.sort_order
mapper.insert:
insert into gb_site_category_relations ( site_id, category_id, relation_type, is_visible, is_editable, sort_order, remark, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{siteId}, #{categoryId},
#{relationType} 'include' , #{isVisible}, #{isEditable}, #{sortOrder}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime} )

insert into gb_site_category_relations(site_id, category_id, is_visible, is_editable, sort_order, relation_type, create_by, create_time) values
(#{item.siteId}, #{item.categoryId}, #{item.isVisible}, #{item.isEditable}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.relationType}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE relation_type = VALUES(relation_type), is_visible = VALUES(is_visible), update_time = NOW()
mapper.delete:
delete from gb_site_category_relations where id in
#{id}
